name: U.S. Bank Triple Cash Rewards Visa® Business Card

welcome_offer.description: $750 cash back after eligible net purchases totaling $6,000 or more are made to the Account Owner’s card within the first 180 days of account opening.
notes: Official U.S. Bank page confirmed $750 after $6,000/180 days on 2026-07-05.

earning_rates.notes: 3% cash back on eligible gas and EV charging station purchases; transactions of $200 or less.
3% cash back on eligible office supply store purchases.
3% cash back on eligible cell phone service provider purchases.
3% cash back on eligible restaurant purchases.

earning_rates.category: Prepaid hotels and car rentals through Travel Center
earning_rates.notes: 5% cash back on prepaid hotels and car rentals booked directly in the U.S. Bank Travel Center.
1% cash back with no total rewards cap.

other_benefits.name: 0% intro APR
other_benefits.description: 0% intro APR on purchases and balance transfers for first 12 billing cycles

other_benefits.name: Employee cards at no cost
other_benefits.description: Free employee cards with custom spend controls

notes: Strong for gas, cell phone bills, and software subscriptions. $750 welcome offer is notable. 3% foreign transaction fee.

recurring_credits.name: $100 annual software credit
recurring_credits.description: $100 statement credit for recurring software subscription purchases (requires $100 spend annually to unlock)
